title: Study of immediate neurological and autonomic changes during kapalbhati pranayama in yoga practitioners.

assets.abstract: Kapalbhati is a fast pace respiratory exercise or pranayam, which is supposed to be practiced by yogis to clean their brain. Pranayamas are well known to improve heart rate variability (HRV) ultimately leading to better autonomic functions. Other studies have observed the immediate effect of kapalbhati on various neurological (brain and spine) and autonomic functions, but their results are varied and inconclusive. The aim of this study is to find out the changes in HRV and brain waves during and

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Breath and soul — pranayama, breath-brain coupling, respiratory-brain interaction, cardiorespiratory entrainment, vagal pathways of consciousness.
